import subprocess
import sys
import torch
import shutil
import logging

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(levelname)s: %(message)s')

configs = [
    {'seed': 0, 'hidden_dim': 256, 'embed_dim': 256, 'dropout': 0.3, 'patience': 7, 'lr': 1e-3, 'epochs': 50},
    {'seed': 1, 'hidden_dim': 256, 'embed_dim': 256, 'dropout': 0.3, 'patience': 7, 'lr': 1e-3, 'epochs': 50},
    {'seed': 2, 'hidden_dim': 256, 'embed_dim': 256, 'dropout': 0.3, 'patience': 5, 'lr': 1e-3, 'epochs': 50},
    {'seed': 3, 'hidden_dim': 512, 'embed_dim': 256, 'dropout': 0.4, 'patience': 5, 'lr': 5e-4, 'epochs': 50},
]

best_auc = -1.0
best_path = None
best_cfg = None

for i, cfg in enumerate(configs):
    path = f'sweep_model_{i}.pt'
    cmd = [
        sys.executable, 'train.py',
        f'--seed={cfg["seed"]}',
        f'--hidden_dim={cfg["hidden_dim"]}',
        f'--embed_dim={cfg["embed_dim"]}',
        f'--dropout={cfg["dropout"]}',
        f'--patience={cfg["patience"]}',
        f'--lr={cfg["lr"]}',
        f'--epochs={cfg["epochs"]}',
        f'--save_path={path}',
        '--batch_size=128',
        '--num_layers=2',
        '--weight_decay=0.0',
    ]
    logging.info(f'=== Training config {i}: {cfg} ===')
    result = subprocess.run(cmd)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        logging.warning(f'Config {i} training failed!')
        continue

    try:
        ckpt = torch.load(path, map_location='cpu')
        auc = ckpt.get('val_auc', -1)
        logging.info(f'Config {i} val_auc: {auc:.4f}')
        if auc > best_auc:
            best_auc = auc
            best_path = path
            best_cfg = cfg
            logging.info(f'New best model!')
    except Exception as e:
        logging.warning(f'Could not load checkpoint for config {i}: {e}')

if best_path is None:
    logging.error('No successful training run found!')
    sys.exit(1)

logging.info(f'Best config: {best_cfg}')
logging.info(f'Best val_auc: {best_auc:.4f}')
shutil.copy(best_path, 'best_model.pt')
logging.info('Copied best model to best_model.pt')
